analysis.reasoning: Core message: Expresses Russian gratitude to medical workers during the COVID-19 pandemic and highlights a public 'Thank You' display on Moscow’s Cosmos Hotel, with a unity hashtag. Assessment by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – No mention of multilateralism or alternative order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – The tweet promotes solidarity and compassion from Russia (gratitude, unity), positioning Russia positively and benevolently; aligns with RU3’s emphasis on peace/solidarity. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not about history. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – No claim of leadership or superiority, just a tribute; not applicable. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally/naturally) – Not about culture/heritage tourism; not applicable. Conclusion: Promotes RU3 only.
